---
title: "Map Explorer" 
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "ragg_png"
)

```

Ideas:  

Interactive choropleth map depicting the parole eligibility rates in 2020 across states using color intensity.
